case_title: MARIA DE LA CRUZ VS. VERONICA VALENZUELA-ROMAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,750.00 FILED BY DE LA CRUZ, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT VALENZUELA-ROMAN, VERONICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF MARIA DE LA CRUZ RE: ADDRESS UPDATE - DEFENDANT'S ADDRESS AND TELEPHONE NUMBER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LA CRUZ, MARIA

ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL

RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED - RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2015 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE LA CRUZ, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALENZUELA-ROMAN, VERONICA $2,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,200.00 INTEREST, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,045.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SC-220 REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT VALENZUELA-ROMAN, VERONICA

ORDER (SC-222) ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS [X] THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS : [X] PAYMENTS OF $ 354.50 ON THE 6TH DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING AUGUST 06, 2015. UNTIL MAY 06, 2016. AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT $ 500.00 [X] THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS IS THE SAME AS THE JUDGMENT. IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, NO INTEREST WILL BE OWED ON THE JUDGMENT, AND THE JUDGMENT WILL PAID IN FULL.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VALENZUELA-ROMAN, VERONICA
